```{=html}
<style>
.partners-carousel {
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 1rem 0;
  mask-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #000 5%, #000 95%, transparent);
  -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #000 5%, #000 95%, transparent);
}

.partners-track {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  width: max-content;
  animation: partners-scroll 34s linear infinite;
}

.partners-carousel:hover .partners-track {
  animation-play-state: paused;
}

.partners-track .logo-box {
  width: 160px;
  height: 70px;
  margin-right: 3rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.partners-track .logo-box img {
  max-height: 55px;
  max-width: 100%;
  object-fit: contain;
  opacity: .90;
  transition: opacity .3s;
}

.partners-track .logo-box img:hover {
  opacity: 1;
}

@keyframes partners-scroll {
  from { transform: translateX(0); }
  to   { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}
</style>

<div class="partners-carousel">
  <div class="partners-track" id="partnersTrack">
    <!-- grupo 1 -->
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/olivapss.png" alt="OlivaPSS"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Stellantis.svg" alt="Stellantis"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/CNH_Industrial.svg" alt="CNHi"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Petrobras_logo.svg" alt="Petrobras"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Aperam_Logo.svg" alt="Aperam"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/NetZero.svg" alt="NetZero"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/data-eng.png" alt="DATA Engenharia"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Arcelormittal-logo.svg" alt="ArcelorMittal Bioflorestas"></div>
    <!-- grupo 2 (idêntico ao grupo 1) -->
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/lapem-logo.png" alt="LAPEM"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/rima-industrial-seeklogo.png" alt="RIMA Industrial"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/biagio-turbos-seeklogo.png" alt="RIMA Industrial"></div>
 <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/aethra-group-automotive-systems-seeklogo.png" alt="Aethra Group"></div>
  <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Halliburton_logo.svg" alt="Halliburton"></div>
<div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Fahren_vetorizado.svg" alt="Fahren"></div>
<div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/STA_logomarca_SET11.svg" alt="STA"></div>
<div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/CTM_logomarca_SET11.svg" alt="CTM"></div>

  

 <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/olivapss.png" alt="OlivaPSS"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Stellantis.svg" alt="Stellantis"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/CNH_Industrial.svg" alt="CNHi"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Petrobras_logo.svg" alt="Petrobras"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Aperam_Logo.svg" alt="Aperam"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/NetZero.svg" alt="NetZero"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/data-eng.png" alt="DATA Engenharia"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Arcelormittal-logo.svg" alt="ArcelorMittal Bioflorestas"></div>
    <!-- grupo 2 (idêntico ao grupo 1) -->
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/lapem-logo.png" alt="LAPEM"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/rima-industrial-seeklogo.png" alt="RIMA Industrial"></div>
    <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/biagio-turbos-seeklogo.png" alt="RIMA Industrial"></div>
 <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/aethra-group-automotive-systems-seeklogo.png" alt="Aethra Group"></div>
 <div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Halliburton_logo.svg" alt="Halliburton"></div>
<div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/Fahren_vetorizado.svg" alt="Fahren"></div>
<div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/STA_logomarca_SET11.svg" alt="STA"></div>
<div class="logo-box"><img src="files/images/partners/CTM_logomarca_SET11.svg" alt="CTM"></div>
 
 </div>
</div>

```
